creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I am trying to update the port devel/git-town. This patch https://people.freebsd.org/~yuri/git-town.patch contains exact GH_TUPLE that modules2tuple suggested. But the build fails:

> can't load package: package stretchr: cannot find package "." in:
> 	/usr/ports/devel/git-town/work/git-town-7.4.0/vendor/stretchr
> *** Error code 1
